lessonsLearned:
1. Use 10,21 EMA with PDL,PDH of Spot chart.Fix you target with minimum of 3 points in price chart. 
2. Like Today Market open below Day Low and when it crosses Day Low , and after it comes back to Day Low again then synchronize with price chart day Low and Day High.
recommendations: Fix the Target of minimum 3 Rs.
Do Follow 2X6 rule. 2 in the morning,2 in the 12:00-02:00,2 in the afternoon
Wait for your setup, If you dont get any trade then its OK.
